title: GujaratJobs Scraper Input
description: Configuration for the GujaratJobs full dataset scraper

baseUrl.title: API Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the GujaratJobs backend (without trailing slash)

apiToken.title: API Bearer Token
apiToken.description: Optional JWT token if the /api/jobs endpoint requires authentication

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: Number of jobs fetched per request (max 50 enforced by the API)

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of filter combinations fetched in parallel. Keep ≤10 to avoid overloading the server.
